title: An American in Rome
writer: Sandro Continenza, Lucio Fulci, Ettore Scola
actors: Alberto Sordi, Maria Pia Casilio, Ilse Peterson
plot: Nando Moriconi is a young Italian living in Rome. He is fond for everything coming from the United States. He tries to speak American-English, to wear clothes he thinks Americans wear, to walk like John Wayne, and to eat cornflake...
